title: Beef Pastry Wrapped with Spicy Red Peppers
description: A deeply flavorful Malaysian beef pastry wrapped dish featuring tender beef, crunchy red peppers, and aromatic spices, all in one keto-friendly pot.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the red bell pepper and mushroom and cook for 3 minutes.
Add the beef strips and cook until browned.
Add the curry powder, fish sauce, and turmeric, and stir well.
Place a sheet of pastry dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Fold the edges over twice to seal the pastry, and brush with a little water.
Repeat with the remaining filling and pastry dough.
Place the pastry wrapped beef in a preheated oven at 180°C and bake for 25 minutes.
Serve hot with your choice of sides.
